headline.title: 微软发布两款新大型语言模型，推动AI竞争升级
headline.summary: 微软今日发布MAI-Thinking-1推理模型（1万亿参数，350亿活跃）和MAI-Code-1-Flash代码模型（1370亿参数，50亿活跃），专为GitHub Copilot和VS Code优化，将向部分用户推出。
headline.summary_en: Microsoft announced MAI-Thinking-1 (1T params, 35B active) for reasoning and MAI-Code-1-Flash (137B params, 5B active) for coding, optimized for GitHub Copilot and VS Code, rolling out to select users.
headline.reason: 微软新模型标志着AI领域的重要进展，参数规模与效率结合，直接影响未来AI应用和行业竞争格局。同时，作为科技巨头动态，与当日AI股市高涨呼应，是日报中最具趋势性的事件。
headline.reason_en: Microsoft's new models represent a major step in AI, combining scale and efficiency, directly impacting future AI applications and industry competition. Aligned with the day's AI-driven stock rally, it is the most trend-setting event in the report.
